d:["$","p",null,{"children":"Facts can expire or be superseded:"}]
e:["$","$L1c",null,{"code":"# Add a fact\nmem.add_fact(\n  subject=\"Project Alpha\",\n  predicate=\"has_deadline\",\n  object=\"2026-05-01\",\n  confidence=0.90,\n)\n\n# Update with new information (old fact auto-expires)\nmem.add_fact(\n  subject=\"Project Alpha\",\n  predicate=\"has_deadline\",\n  object=\"2026-05-15\",\n  confidence=0.95,\n)\n\n# Query current facts only\nfacts = mem.query_facts(\n  subject=\"Project Alpha\",\n  current_only=True,\n)\n","language":"python"}]
f:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Graph Queries"}]
10:["$","$L1c",null,{"code":"# Direct lookup\nfacts = mem.query_facts(subject=\"Alice\")\n\n# Relationship traversal\nrelated = mem.traverse(subject=\"Alice\", depth=2)\n\n# Pattern matching\nmatches = mem.query_facts(\n  predicate=\"reports_to\",\n  object=\"Carol\",\n)\n","language":"python"}]
11:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Extraction from Working Memory"}]
12:["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne automatically extracts triples during consolidation:"}]
14:["$","p",null,{"children":"Extraction uses a lightweight local model (no API calls) and runs during sleep cycles."}]
